context_card.data_source: baln.logic AI Analysis · Google Search Grounding
context_card.fallback_historical: Historically, markets have tended to recover after short-term shocks. Building a habit of reading context daily is your best defense against panic selling.
context_card.fallback_political: Collecting political trend data. Historically, political events caused short-term fluctuations but had limited long-term investment impact.
context_card.fallback_institutional: Collecting institutional investor behavior data. Institutions rebalance by rules and do not panic sell.
context_card.fallback_impact: Analyzing today's market impact on your portfolio.

notifications.push_desc: Turn all notifications on or off at once

notifications.rebalance_summary: We'll notify you when your portfolio needs review
notifications.rebalance_detail_1: Weekly rebalancing reminder every Monday at 9 AM

notifications.rebalance_detail_3: Rebalancing means adjusting your assets back to your target allocation
notifications.price_summary: Don't miss large price movements in your holdings
notifications.price_detail_1: Daily price change check notification at 7:30 AM
notifications.price_detail_2: Highlights assets that moved beyond your threshold (±3/5/7%) when you open the app
notifications.price_detail_3: You can adjust the threshold in the 'Price Change Threshold' section below
notifications.price_detail_4: e.g. With ±5% threshold, an asset that dropped -6.2% yesterday triggers a check alert
notifications.market_summary: Receive daily AI-analyzed market trends every morning
notifications.market_detail_1: Daily AI briefing notification at 8 AM
notifications.market_detail_2: AI analyzes the previous day's market data and summarizes key insights
notifications.market_detail_3: Includes interest rate/FX/major index changes + portfolio prescription
notifications.price_threshold_desc: Set the minimum price movement percentage for the price change alert.
notifications.weekly_cap_desc: Limit the number of notifications per week to reduce notification fatigue.
notifications.info_permission: Notifications require permission to be enabled. Check that baln notifications are turned on in your device settings.
notifications.info_timing: Notification times are based on your device's local time. Price alert 7:30 → Morning briefing 8:00 → Rebalancing check 9:00 (Monday).

help.title: Help
help.faq_a1: baln is an investment education app where you build your own investment principles by reading daily 5-minute market context, participating in predictions, and reviewing outcomes. It is not a trading app.
help.faq_a2: The Context Card helps you understand why your assets moved today through 4-layer analysis (historical context, macro chain, institutional behavior, portfolio impact) in 5 minutes. It auto-updates every 3 hours.
help.faq_q3: How do I participate in the prediction game?
help.faq_a3: Vote YES/NO on 3 daily market prediction questions. Review results and explanations the next day. Earn 3 credits for correct predictions.
help.faq_a4: 1 credit = ₩100. Earn for free via check-in (2C), correct prediction (3C), sharing (5C). Spend in the marketplace for extra AI analysis (1C), Premium trial (5C), etc.
help.faq_q5: How does the AI health checkup work?
help.faq_a5: AI analyzes 7 factors including diversification, volatility, and concentration, rating your portfolio from A+ to F. It also provides a prescription with specific improvement steps.
help.faq_a6: AI analyzes the philosophy of world-class investors like Warren Buffett, Ray Dalio, Cathie Wood, and Stanley Druckenmiller, and provides daily insights applied to today's market.
help.faq_a7: We operate on a Zero-Knowledge principle. We do not collect brokerage passwords or account numbers. All data is encrypted with TLS 1.3 + AES-256.
help.faq_q8: What are the benefits of a Premium subscription?
help.faq_a8: Full 4-layer context card analysis, prediction explanations + review, 3 AI diagnoses/day, institutional behavior analysis, full peer comparison, and 30C monthly bonus. ₩4,900/month.
help.feedback_desc: You can submit feedback via Settings > Help
